content: SRD 5.1 requires this exact attribution string: 'This work includes material taken from the System Reference Document 5.1 ("SRD 5.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC and available at https://dnd.wizards.com/resources/systems-reference-document. The SRD 5.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.' SRD 5.2 has an analogous but distinct required string pointing to dndbeyond.com/srd. CC-BY 4.0 also requires noting modifications made and including a warranty/liability disclaimer. Mixing 5.1-sourced and 5.2-sourced content requires including both attribution blocks, not one.
